creator: maurice@atum.castro.aus.net
text:
The pwgen-1.15 port no longer has sources available on the web
	and hence cannot be built. This port is used in davical and 
	I am trying to determine if the pwgen port has been retired.

Fix: 

One of the following:
		1. provide repository
		2. withdraw port
		3. update port to new repository
	I can provide a copy of the sources if required.

	Many Thanks
